default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: Umm... Is the Bureau... also a place that cleanses people? Rumina has some candles here that can attract all voyagers who need to be "cleansed" for you...

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: The candlelight... burns even brighter now...

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: Rumina's face is always cracked... and my heart too... The air seeps through the cracks, hurting Rumina so much... Oh... the hot spring bath of the inn is ready now. Could you come and help Rumina... mend these wounds?

default.title: Level Start
default.text: Let's see who else isn't home yet...

default.title: Success
default.text: You're smiling. It seems Rumina has done a good job.

default.title: Failed
default.text: ...Please trust Rumina. This won't happen next time...

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: Boiling wax makes the bath of death.

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: Save me... Please...

default.title: Greeting
default.text: Hmm, you came just in time. Rumina just made some sugar-free cheese roll cake... Would you like to try it? Does it really "taste like chewing wax"?

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: Rumina is "cursed"... The picture book Seon gave me says that if Rumina melts the "bad guys" in the bath, the "curse" will be broken, and my body won't be like this anymore...

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: Your house is completely different from Rumina's inn, yet why does it feel so familiar? It's like... when Seon was still here... The memories in my head are missing a piece. Seon's face is missing a piece.

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: Rumina loves the darkness... Because... darkness is candlelight's best friend, making the light appear warmer and clearer... The people in picture books also come alive when the candlelight flickers ever so slightly.

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: What does... Chief... mean?... Oh, you own this place, so you are the "Chief"... Rumina is here too, does Rumina belong to you as well?

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: Rumina doesn't want to be alone. If only you could spare a finger for Rumina to hold onto... or an arm for Rumina to hug... N-neither is possible?... Alright then, Rumina will think of another way.

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: Everyone in this house... has been so kind to Rumina, so Rumina will do as you wish. Be kind to them, and befriend more of them... All of this can happen because you're by my side. As long as you're here, Rumina won't be afraid anymore.

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: You've used your power to build a little house in your palm, where Rumina can stay safe... Hearing your heartbeat every day... makes Rumina so happy.

default.title: Idle
default.text: ...If you are feeling tired, Rumina will be happy to serve you; if you are not, Rumina will be happy for you. Wishing you a pleasant day.

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: ...Please, can you not push Rumina away? Rumina wants to stay by your side, always close to you...

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: Are you saying you're willing to stay with Rumina forever? How wonderful... Tonight, before bed, could you hold my hand and read me a new picture book?

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: Sure, Rumina will go right away.

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: The "bad guys" are all in the hot spring bath now. Here, these are their most precious belongings. Did Rumina do well?

default.title: Upgrade
default.text: So warm... my body is melting away...
